case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1488.OO US et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-10-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA CORBIN, ANTHONY JEROME

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $488.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT ANTHONY CORBIN. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,000.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF ANTHONY CORBIN. RULING: DISCUSSED AND THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUED THE MATTER TO 02/10/09 FOR CLAIMANT TO FILE AN OPPOSITION BY 02/05/09. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-07-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
AMENDED CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY CLAIMANT CORBIN, ANTHONY JEROME AS TO PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1488.OO US CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100,INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF ANTHONY CORBIN, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR JAN-07-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER, PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF ANTHONY CORBIN. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR BY MOVING PARTY. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
To Strike The Claim Of Anthony Corbin
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER, PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion to Strike The Claim Of Anthony Corbin. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar by moving party. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

To Strike The Claim Of Anthony Corbin
Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Continued To Feb-10-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Strike The Claim Of Anthony Corbin.
APPEARANCES: Anthony Corbin, 724-5730 claimant & opposing party in propria persona; no other appearances.
RULING: Discussed and the Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 02/10/09 for claimant to file an opposition by 02/05/09. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
